instruction: Please write something up for our Southside community blood pressure workshops and save it in /Community Education/Outreach. Title it "Blood Pressure Check-In Questions" and cover opening questions, medication review prompts, and signs that should lead participants to follow up with a clinic.

rule_ref.rule_text: For recurring teaching or outreach materials, he prefers creating reusable templates instead of one-off documents.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: For teaching and outreach materials, I like reusable templates instead of starting from scratch every time.

attributes.title: Southside Blood Pressure Screening Recap
attributes.content_brief: Summary of attendance, referral counts, and volunteer observations from a neighborhood screening event.

attributes.title: Blood Pressure Workshop Intro Notes
attributes.content_brief: Brief speaking notes covering introductions, home monitoring reminders, and discussion prompts for a community session.

attributes.title: Blood Pressure Outreach Follow-Up Memo
attributes.content_brief: Handoff note listing participants who asked for callback after a church outreach table.

attributes.title: Cholesterol Class Questions
attributes.content_brief: Facilitator notes with discussion questions for a public education session on diet, lab results, and medication adherence.

attributes.title: Blood Pressure Counseling Question Sheet
attributes.content_brief: Blank question-and-response format with sections for symptoms, medications, and follow-up guidance.
